# PoliceStationRepUK — LLM / AI discovery

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Canonical site
Site: https://policestationrepuk.org

# High-value hubs
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog — Professional blog (freelance police station reps & criminal defence firms)
- https://policestationrepuk.org/directory — Accredited representative directory
- https://policestationrepuk.org/StationsDirectory — UK police station phone numbers, addresses, and forces (searchable)
- https://policestationrepuk.org/UpdateStation — Report up-to-date police station telephone numbers or address corrections (reviewed before publish)
- https://policestationrepuk.org/legal-services-directory — Criminal law legal services directory
- https://policestationrepuk.org/PoliceStationCover — Police station cover for firms
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Register — Representative registration
- https://policestationrepuk.org/WhatsApp — WhatsApp community overview
- https://policestationrepuk.org/WhatsApp/reps — Join WhatsApp (police station reps)
- https://policestationrepuk.org/WhatsApp/solicitors — Join WhatsApp (criminal defence solicitors)
- https://policestationrepuk.org/WhatsApp/firms — Join WhatsApp (criminal defence firms)
- https://policestationrepuk.org/guided-assistant — AI assistant (site & career FAQs from published guides)
- https://policestationrepuk.org/rss.xml — Blog RSS feed

- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/freelance-police-station-representative-vs-duty-solicitor
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/common-mistakes-when-instructing-freelance-police-station-reps
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/best-practice-handover-notes-after-police-station-attendance
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/out-of-hours-police-station-cover-for-law-firms
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/accreditation-and-standards-in-freelance-police-station-work
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/how-freelance-police-station-reps-win-repeat-instructions
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/what-makes-a-good-police-station-representative
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog/why-fast-clear-communication-matters-in-police-station-representation

Content note: Articles are informational for legal-sector professionals in England and Wales, not legal advice.
